title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - CA-3
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: CA-3 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control CA-3 in the Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring family. The control title for CA-3 is Information Exchange. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: IA-4 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, IA-4, belongs to the Identification and Authentication family and is titled Identifier Management. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
